metadata.description: Claude Code plugins for XrmToolBox and Dynamics 365 / Dataverse development

plugins.name: xrmtoolbox
plugins.description: Skills for building and testing XrmToolBox plugins for Dynamics 365 / Dataverse. Development, packaging, publishing, test scaffolding, mocks, and UI testing.

plugins.name: skill-authoring
plugins.description: Meta-skill for authoring and publishing Claude Code skills to the HurleySk marketplace. Scaffolding, best practices, CI/CD setup, and marketplace registration.

plugins.name: cicd-safety
plugins.description: Claude Code skills for CI/CD safety — production protection hooks, environment validation, deployment guardrails.

plugins.name: knbn
plugins.description: Claude Code skills for the knbn kanban board — register work items, smart-join existing cards, and post status updates to track work across multiple Claude Code instances.

plugins.name: sherlock
plugins.description: Domain analyst skills for Claude Code — ETL/data migration analysis, mapping document generation, data lineage tracing with column-level precision.

plugins.name: skill-engine
plugins.description: Hook-driven skill activation and guardrail enforcement for Claude Code projects. Reads skill-rules.json to suggest relevant skills on prompt and enforce guardrails on file edits.

plugins.name: refresh
plugins.description: One-shot refresh of Claude Code marketplaces, plugin updates, and session reload.

plugins.name: gantt
plugins.description: Project management skills — conversational planning with iterative discovery, deterministic date sequencing with US federal holiday awareness, dependency tracking, critical path analysis, MS Project sync via mpp-mcp, and Excel export/import via excel-mcp.

plugins.name: ebay-resale
plugins.description: eBay resale profit analysis - evaluate listings for buy/resell profitability with fee calculation, time-to-sell prediction, and configurable thresholds.

plugins.name: resume-coach
plugins.description: Collaborative resume building, tailoring, review, interview prep, and Google Drive organization.
